tools.name: analyze_android_project
tools.description: Analyzes an Android project's source code for security vulnerabilities. Accepts project files (AndroidManifest.xml, build.gradle, Java/Kotlin sources, XML configs) and returns a structured security report with findings, severity scores, and recommendations.

tools.name: list_android_security_checks
tools.description: Returns the list of all implemented security checks/rules with their IDs, categories, severity levels, and descriptions.

tools.name: explain_finding
tools.description: Explains a specific security finding by its rule ID. Returns why it is a risk, how to fix it, and false positive considerations.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Returns the server health status, version, and rule engine statistics.
